info.name: Email Validator API
info.description: Advanced email validation with syntax checking, MX records, disposable detection, and deliverability scoring

request.description: Validate a single email address with comprehensive checks

response.name: Valid Email Response
response.body:
{
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "is_valid": true,
  "score": 90,
  "checks": {
    "syntax_valid": true,
    "mx_found": true,
    "is_disposable": false,
    "is_free_provider": false,
    "is_role_address": false
  },
  "domain": "example.com",
  "mx_records": [{ "exchange": "mail.example.com", "priority": 10 }],
  "suggestion": null
}

request.description: Validate multiple emails (up to 50) in a single request

response.name: Bulk Validation Response
